import json, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

qli = pd.DataFrame(var_call_ZvEY9qD6AUdZyziTa4Wti6tZ)

path = Path(var_call_hkGfXmvrwaC0KnwR0J6B9Oul)
data = json.loads(path.read_text())
ka = pd.DataFrame(data)

invalid = ka[ka['title'].str.contains('Quote Configuration', case=False, na=False)]

result_id = None
if not invalid.empty:
    result_id = invalid.iloc[0]['id']

out = json.dumps(result_id)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)

val_args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

path = Path(var_call_hkGfXmvrwaC0KnwR0J6B9Oul)
data = json.loads(path.read_text())
ka = pd.DataFrame(data)

cands = ka[ka['faq_answer__c'].str.contains('quantity', case=False, na=False) | ka['faq_answer__c'].str.contains('pricing', case=False, na=False) | ka['faq_answer__c'].str.contains('discount', case=False, na=False)]

result_id = None
if not cands.empty:
    result_id = cands.iloc[0]['id']

out = json.dumps(result_id)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)
